caption: A man with dark skin, wearing a light blue button-down shirt, is captured in a series of close-up shots. He is positioned in front of a background consisting of a tan brick wall and a dark chalkboard. The chalkboard contains handwritten text in white chalk, including the legible phrases "de l'Afrique" and "Les lac". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and shifting his gaze. Initially, he looks toward the left with a slight smile and open mouth. As the scene progresses, he maintains his focus toward the left, his expression becoming more serious as he continues to talk. His head moves slightly, and his facial muscles shift with the articulation of his speech. The lighting is consistent across the frames, highlighting the contours of his face against the neutral tones of the wall and chalkboard.
